text: Why do people think the writer is mad?
zh: 为什么大家觉得这位作者疯了?

text: Aeroplanes are slowly driving me mad.
zh: 飞机正在慢慢把我逼疯。

text: I live near an airport and passing planes can be heard night and day.
zh: 我住在机场附近,飞机经过时昼夜都能听见。

text: The airport was built years ago, but for some reason it could not be used then.
zh: 这个机场早年就建好了,但不知为何一直没启用。

text: Last year, however, it came into use.
zh: 不过去年它开始投入使用了。

text: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes by the noise.
zh: 一定有一百多人因为噪音搬离了家。

text: I am one of the few people left.
zh: 我是留下来的少数人之一。

text: Sometimes I think this house will be knocked down by a passing plane.
zh: 有时我觉得这栋房子会被飞过的飞机撞塌。

text: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away, but I am determined to stay here.
zh: 有人出高价让我搬走,但我决心留在这里。

text: Everybody says I must be mad and they are probably right.
zh: 大家都说我一定是疯了,他们大概说得没错。
